summary: Frontend-only end-to-end UI testing of CASNAGGI charity redesign (7 pages + header/footer). All 46 targeted UI assertions passed on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Covered routing, data-testids, content rendering, forms (contact 'Message sent' confirmation, newsletter form present), Donate page (4 amount cards, bank + contact cards, copy-email button), broken-image scan across all 7 pages (0 broken of 34 total imgs), and mobile menu open/close. No console errors or page errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Donate page 'Bank' details are placeholders (Account number = 'Available on request', Swift/Country = 'Nigeria'). OK per product choice (static Donate button / no payments) but ensure copy is intentional.
Social links in ORG.socials use href='#' placeholders – acceptable for MVP but should be replaced with real URLs before go-live.
Programs page only 6 programs are centralized in data/content.js (PROGRAMS) – good DRY; no duplication found.
No backend code present (frontend-only). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is defined in frontend/.env but unused, which is expected for this static site.
All interactive elements carry data-testid attributes. Header, footer, and page sections are fully testable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is a static React marketing site at https://charity-redesign-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Routes: /, /about, /programs, /impact, /get-involved, /donate, /contact. All key interactive elements have data-testid (see Header.jsx: nav-about, nav-programs, nav-impact, nav-get-involved, nav-contact, nav-logo, header-donate-btn, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, utility-phone, utility-email; Donate.jsx: donate-amounts, donate-amount-0..3, give-bank, give-contact, donate-copy-email, donate-contact-btn; Contact.jsx: contact-form, contact-first-name, contact-last-name, contact-email-input, contact-phone-input, contact-role, contact-message, contact-submit; Footer.jsx: site-footer, footer-donate-btn, footer-volunteer-btn, footer-<nav-testid>). Contact form uses preventDefault + setState; button text toggles to 'Message sent' for 4s. Donate copy-email uses navigator.clipboard (requires clipboard-write permission when testing headlessly).
